quote: We watched our film and I don't think I've ever smiled, cried, and laughed so much all at once. It felt like you brought all the magic of that evening right back to us.
From the first conversation we knew Engage was different. They didn't just want to film us — they wanted to understand us. The result is a film that feels more like us than any photo ever could.
I was nervous about being on camera but they made it feel like it was just the two of us. Watching the final film, I barely remember the camera being there. It's just... us. And it's perfect.
We've watched our engagement film probably fifty times now and it still gives me chills. The music, the pacing, the way they captured the light — it's a piece of art.
They turned a rainy afternoon into the most cinematic, beautiful film. I don't know how they do it, but they found magic in every moment — even the imperfect ones. Especially those.
My parents watched our film and my mom couldn't stop crying. She said it was the most beautiful thing she'd ever seen. That alone was worth everything.
